title: Raid on the Suprosa
content:

Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] |conc= |next=[[Battle of Kothlis]] |image=[[File:Battle_of_Bothawui.jpg]] |name=Raid on the Suprosa |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=[[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |place=[[Both system]] |result=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] victory |side1=*Alliance to Restore the Republic |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Koth Melan]] *[[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] |commanders2=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sivar]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*12 [[BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighters]] **[[Blue Squadron (Bothan)|Blue Squadron]] ***[[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] *1 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] *1 [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]] **[[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']] *[[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] |forces2=*1 Heavily modified [[MB-C1 medium transport]] **''[[Suprosa]]'' *1 [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] **[[Hunter (Victory I-class)|''Hunter'']] *1 [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] **[[Claw (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Claw'']] *12 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] *12 [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] *6 [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] *27 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[Imperial loader droid]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*6 Y-wing starfighters **12 Bothan pilots |casual2=*1 Star Destroyer *''Suprosa'' severely crippled *Several TIE fighters *Imperial loader droid *Most of the Suprosa's crew and stormtroopers |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Attention those on board the freighter ''Suprosa''. This is Commander Skywalker of the Alliance. Shut down your engines and prepare to be boarded.''"
"''This is captain of the ''Suprosa''. Are you crazy? We're hauling fertilizer here! What kind of pirates ''are'' you?!''"
"''We are not pirates. Like I said, we're with the Alliance. And maybe we have a big garden.|Luke Skywalker and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sivar]]|}} The '''raid''' on the ''Suprosa'' was a battle in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in which the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] plans were secured. ==Prelude== The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] freighter ''[[Suprosa]]'' was carrying secret Imperial construction data from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] under an [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|XTS]] contract, under the guise of hauling fertilizer. [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] leader [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] leaked information concerning the construction project to the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]], who learned of the freighter's schedule. Spynet leader [[Koth Melan]] then turned the information over to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] through [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]]. ==The battle== Striking from a hidden Rebel outpost on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], twelve [[Blue Squadron (Bothan)|Blue Squadron]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter#BTL-S3 Y-wing|BTL-S3 Y-wings]], piloted by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] pilots and Alliance pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], led by Skywalker, Rendar, and Melan, ambushed the ship as it exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ''Suprosa'' responded by firing a single [[diamond boron missile]] which Rendar hit, but failed to destroy. The missile hit four Bothan Y-wings, destroying them. Six Y-wings were lost in total during the battle. After concentrated fire brought down the ''Suprosa''{{'s}} engines, The freighter's pilot surrendered, and Rendar and Melan, leading a team of Bothans, boarded the ship in the [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']] to capture the supercomputer, which was later determined to be holding the location and plans of the Second Death Star. ===Infiltration=== [[File:SuprosaStormtrooper-SotE.jpg|left|Inside the freighter|thumb]] Rendar ripped through inner defenses and into the hangar. A [[Imperial loader droid|loader droid]], normally used for moving supplies through [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] hangars, recognized Rendar as a hostile and used its spring-loaded arms against Rendar. Rendar blasted the droid down, and opened the hangar, allowing [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Koth Melan]] to land in the ship and secure the plans. ===Imperial Ambush=== After capturing the plans, Koth Melan told Skywalker that the computer was being encrypted and protected by a self destruct device, and that a special Bothan encryption team on [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]] would be able to access its contents. However, while en route to Kothlis, the party was attacked by the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Claw (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Claw'']] and the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Hunter (Victory I-class)|''Hunter'']]. However, the ''Claw'' was driven off by Blue Squadron, and the Rebels managed to arrive at Kothlis. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Many Bothans died to bring us this information.|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]|{{Film|VI}}}} Although clearly a Rebel victory, the battle was a trap laid by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The Imperial data carried by the freighter were the plans to the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]. The plans were, in truth, outdated, and the second Death Star was fully operational, unlike what the schematics read. With the success of the battle, the Alliance had gained trust in the crime lord Xizor. The plans were moved to [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], where Koth Melan and Bothan technicians helped decode the data. A bounty hunter raid, led by [[Skahtul]], captured Skywalker and killed Melan. The plans managed to reach the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Razor (CR90 corvette)|''Razor'']] over the planet, which was attacked by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] aboard the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], supported by the [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']], who had come to Kothlis to collect Skywalker as well as to make it appear as if the Empire was genuinely concerned with the loss of the plans, initiating the [[Battle of Kothlis]]. ==Behind the scenes== In the book [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], Luke is credited with disabling ''Suprosa'' by himself, whereas in the video game, ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'', Ace is the one that incapacitates the freighter. For this article, both are assumed to be correct, with Ace keeping the ship from firing its weapons again, and Luke disabling the ship's engines. It is important to note however that according to the SOTE novel, there was not enough time to notify Rebel command of the "Endor Project" plans being transferred on the Suprosa. Therefore there is no mention of Ace. The novel implies that other than Luke Skywalker and Dash Rendar, all of the other pilots present were Bothans. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}} *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' abridged audiobook]] *[[Star Wars: game]] *[[Shadows of the Empire 4|''Shadows of the Empire'' 4]] *''[[The Rise and Fall of Darth Vader]]'' {{Mo}} *{{Film|VI}} {{Imo}} *{{RJRadio|Pattern and Web}} {{Imo}} ==Sources==
